assignments.name: backend_error
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { if ($json.errors && Array.isArray($json.errors) && $json.errors.length > 0) return $json.errors[0]; if ($json.error && typeof $json.error === 'string') { try { const m = $json.error.match(/^\d+\s*-\s*(\{[\s\S]*\})$/); if (m) { const p = JSON.parse(m[1]); if (p.errors && p.errors.length > 0) return p.errors[0]; if (p.message) return p.message; } } catch(e) {} return $json.error; } return $json.message || ''; })() }}

nodes.name: Set - Format Send for Approval Result
Set - Build Sync Order Lines Payload
Set - Format Sync Order Lines Result
Set - Build Create With Lines Body
Code - Build Sync After Create Payload

parameters.jsCode:
const resp = $json || {};
const results = Array.isArray(resp.results) ? resp.results : [];
const cancelledEmptyOrder = resp.cancelled_empty_order === true;
const orderStatus = resp.order_status || resp.status || (cancelledEmptyOrder ? 'Cancelled' : 'Draft');
const normalized = $('Code - Normalize Order Payload').item.json || {};

return [{
  json: {
    success: resp.success === true && !cancelledEmptyOrder,
    action: "create_order_with_lines",
    order_id: resp.order_id || "",
    order_status: orderStatus,
    status: orderStatus,
    message: resp.message || (cancelledEmptyOrder ? "No matching pigs were available, so the empty draft was cancelled." : ""),
    create_success: resp.create_success === true,
    sync_success: resp.sync_success === true,
    sync_results: resp.sync_results || results,
    results: results,
    partial_fulfillment: resp.partial_fulfillment === true,
    complete_fulfillment: resp.complete_fulfillment === true,
    fulfillment_status: resp.fulfillment_status || "",
    requested_total: resp.requested_total,
    matched_total: resp.matched_total,
    unmatched_total: resp.unmatched_total,
    incomplete_items: Array.isArray(resp.incomplete_items) ? resp.incomplete_items : [],
    cancelled_empty_order: cancelledEmptyOrder,
    cancel_result: resp.cancel_result || null,
    sync_message: resp.sync_message || "",
    auto_quote: resp.auto_quote || null,
    quote_send: resp.quote_send || null,
    send_quote_if_ready: normalized.send_quote_if_ready === true,
    created_from_intake: normalized.created_from_intake === true,
    intake_id: normalized.intake_id || "",
    conversation_id: normalized.conversation_id || "",
    account_id: normalized.account_id || "",
    contact_id: normalized.contact_id || "",
    customer_phone: normalized.customer_phone || "",
    customer_channel: normalized.customer_channel || "",
    customer_language: normalized.customer_language || "",
    payment_method: normalized.payment_method || "",
    collection_location: normalized.collection_location || "",
    customer_name: normalized.customer_name || "",
    requested_category: normalized.requested_category || "",
    requested_weight_range: normalized.requested_weight_range || ""
  }
}];
